prompt: Transparent background. Stylized packrat (small rodent) in refined minimal line-art, holding one abstract symbolic record: a simple flat card or rectangle with a single horizontal divider line suggesting structured data—no legible text, no icons. Warm beige and tan palette only (cream through deep tan, roughly #f4ebe0 #d9cbb8 #a0907a #6e6254), no pure black, no gradients, no shading blocks. Two stroke weights for hierarchy. Editorial product-illustration quality—not photorealistic, not emoji, not clipart. Generous negative space. Square 1:1 composition, subject centered or slightly off-center.
